headlines.title: Trump tests and looming battleground races highlight Tuesday’s primaries
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s endorsement will once again be put to the test in multiple Republican primaries Tuesday, which will also mark the kickoff of major general election campaigns for Senate and governor in battleground Georgia

headlines.title: FBI foiled alleged plot to attack White House UFC event, Kash Patel says
headlines.description: The FBI foiled an alleged plot to attack Sunday’s UFC fight at the White House, FBI Director Kash Patel said in a post to X.

headlines.title: Trump signals shift in focus to Ukraine, with Iran war soon in ‘rearview’
headlines.description: The Iran war is not exactly done and dusted, but President Donald Trump has already turned his sights to ending another conflict

headlines.title: Suspect's mother called police about UFC attack plot concerns
headlines.description: The FBI has arrested 19-year-old Tycen Proper in Ohio for an alleged plot to attack the UFC event hosted at the White House. NBC News' Tom Winter reports on the concerns Proper's mother called into police and the charges he is facing.

headlines.title: FBI foils alleged plot to attack the White House UFC event
headlines.description: The FBI foiled an alleged plot to attack the UFC fight at the White House, FBI Director Kash Patel said in a post on X. NBC News' Ryan Reilly reports on what we know about the alleged plot and how drones were planned to be used.

headlines.title: Gov. Newsom Says Trump’s DOJ is Investigating Him and His Wife
headlines.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Monday said he and his wife are being investigated by the Justice Department and claims he is being targeted by the Trump White House for political reasons. “He’s coming after me because I’m considering running for President” NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Gavin Newsom says DOJ is investigating him and his wife and blames Trump
headlines.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom said Monday that he and his wife are being investigated by the Justice Department and accused President Donald Trump of targeting him for political reasons.“Today, my wife & I joined Donald Trump’s hit list.

headlines.title: Vance says nuclear inspectors ‘absolutely’ will return to Iran under terms to end war
headlines.description: The vice president, in an interview with NBC News, also said text of the memorandum of understanding between the U.S. and Iran won’t be released until Friday.

headlines.title: 3 takeaways from our new poll: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Welcome to From the Politics Desk, a daily newsletter that brings you the NBC News Politics team’s latest reporting and analysis from the White House, Capitol Hill and the campaign trail
